/CAL:JURY TRIAL PROCEEDINGS/INTORD:KOREAN/INTC/X:A SECOND CERTIFIED KOREAN INTERPRETER, TED KIM, APPEARED FOR THE AFTERNOON SESSION OF THIS MATTER,//X:COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENSE INDICATES ITS INTENTION TO FILE A MOTION FOR MISTRIAL AND THE PARTIES AGREE TO THE FOLLOWING BRIEFING SCHEDULE - DEFENSE MOTION DUE BY 10-09-18; OPPOSITION DUE BY 10-17-18; REPLY BRIEF, IF ANY, WILLBE DUE BY 10-25-18,/ /CONTD:HEARING TO DETERMINE CASE STATUS/DOPC/

/CAL:JURY TRIAL PROCEEDINGS/INTORD:KOREAN/INTC/X:WILLIAM KIM, A COURT CERTIFIED KOREAN INTERPRETER, IS ASSISTING IN THIS MATTER,/X: SONG PARK, A PROVISIONALLY QUALIFIED INTERPRETER OF THE KOREAN LANGAGE IS ASSISTING IN THIS MATTER,/X: PURSUANT TO CRC 2,893(D)(2), THE COURT MAKES A FINDING THATA THIRD CERTIFIED OR REGISTERED INTERPRETER OF THE KOREAN LANGUAGE IS NOT AVAILABLE,/X:AN INT-120 FORM IS ON-FILE WITH THE COURT ADMINISTRATOR,   /TEXT:TRIAL PHASE VOIR DIRE - JURY SELECTION/

/CAL:JURY TRIAL PROCEEDINGS/INTORD:KOREAN/X: THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO APPOINT AND THAT NON CERTIFIED INTERPRETER, PETER KIM, DULY SWORN AND OATH GIVEN, INTERPRETING KOREAN,  WHO IS PRESENT, TO BE QUALIFIED TO INTERPRETTHE AFOREMENTIONED LANGUAGE, THE PEOPLE MAKE NO OBJECTION,/X:COUNSEL FORTHE DEFENDANT AGAIN MOVES THE COURT FOR DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO PC 1382,  THEMOTION IS DENIED AS FURTHER SET FORTH ON THE RECORD,/TEXT:TRIAL PHASE VOIR DIRE- JURY SELECTION/CONTD: JURY SELECTION - VOIR DIRE/DOP/

/CAL:JURY TRIAL PROCEEDINGS/INTORD:KOREAN/X:THE PARTIES WERE SENT TO DEPT23 FOR SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS WITH JUDGE HITE, SETTLEMENT WAS NOT REACHED,THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED BACK AT 1:30 PM TO DEPARTMENT 10 FOR FURTHER PROCEEDINGS,/X: THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL BY ONE DAY, TO SEPTEMBER 5, 2018 FOR THE FOLLOWING REASONS, STATED IN MORE DETAIL ON THERECORD: (1) THE ABSENCE ON AUGUST 30 AND 31 OF ADA BLAIR MCGREGOR, THE ASSIGNED PROSECUTOR, DUE TO AN UNEXPECTED MEDICAL EMERGENCY MR, MCGREGOR SUFFERED THE EVENING OF AUGUST 29; (2) THE COURT'S UNCERTAINTY AS TO WHETHER MR,MCGREGOR'S HEALTH CONDITION WOULD IMPROVE SUFFICIENTLY BY SEPTEMBER 4 TO PERMIT HIMTO TRY THE CASE; (3) THE COURT'S INABILITY PRIOR TO SEPTEMBER 4, DUE TO MR,MCGREGOR'S ABSENCE, TO DISCUSS WITH BOTH COUNSEL THE ANTICIPATED LENGTH OF THE TRIAL AND ANY NECESSARY PRETRIAL PROCEEDINGS, INCLUDING EVIDENTIARY HEARINGS UNDER EVIDENCE CODE SECTION 402 AND IN LIMINE MOTIONS; AND (4) THE COURT'S UNWILLINGNESS UNDER THE CIRCUMSTANCES TO REQUIRE A LARGE NUMBER OF PROSPECTIVE JURORS TO REPORT, QUITE POSSIBLY UNNECESSARILY, FOR JURYDUTY ON SEPTEMBER 4,/CONTD: JURY SELECTION/DOP/
/CAL:TRIAL PROCEEDINGS/LD:09-04-18/X:DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF COUNSELFOR THE PEOPLE, THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO CONTINUE THE MATTER,/CONTD:TRIAL PROCEEDINGS/DOP/

/INTC/X: REPRESENTATIVE FROM AL GRAF BAILBONDS APPEARS TO ADDRESS THE COURT AND REQUESTS TO SURRENDER DEFENDANT AND HAVE BOND EXONERATED,/BE/X: COURT DOES NOT REMAND THE DEFENDANT INTO CUSTODY,/X:ARIANA MAXWELL APPEARS FROM NEW CENTURY BONDS TO ADDRESS COURT AND ENTERA NEW SURETY BOND, COURT ORDERS HER TO IMMEDIATELY REPORT TO THE BOND DESK WITH DEFENDANT TO ENTER THEBOND,/X:MATTER IS CONTINUED TO 07-15-16, DEPT 23 AND TRIAL DATE IN DEPARMENT 22 OF 07-15-16,/

/CAL:BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN DA:NICHOLAS WISE/EXHMA:3 -MEDICAL RECORDS/CTORD:DEFENSE EXHIBITS A THROUGH I ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE//HTA1:1, 2, AND 3/X:THE COURT FINDS SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS,/X:THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TO RAISE BAIL AND REMAND DEFENDANT,/MO DENIED//TWA/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT IN DEPT 22 ON 06-17-15/DOP/CTORD:EXHIBITS RETURNED

docket_entries.docketEntryComment: /CAL:JURY TRIAL PROCEEDINGS/INTORD:KOREAN/X:THE PARTIES WERE SENT TO DEPT23 FOR SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS WITH JUDGE HITE, SETTLEMENT WAS NOT REACHED,THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED BACK AT 1:30 PM TO DEPARTMENT 10 FOR FURTHER PROCEEDINGS,/X: THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL BY ONE DAY, TO SEPTEMBER 5, 2018 FOR THE FOLLOWING REASONS, STATED IN MORE DETAIL ON THERECORD: (1) THE ABSENCE ON AUGUST 30 AND 31 OF ADA BLAIR MCGREGOR, THE ASSIGNED PROSECUTOR, DUE TO AN UNEXPECTED MEDICAL EMERGENCY MR, MCGREGOR SUFFERED THE EVENING OF AUGUST 29; (2) THE COURT'S UNCERTAINTY AS TO WHETHER MR,MCGREGOR'S HEALTH CONDITION WOULD IMPROVE SUFFICIENTLY BY SEPTEMBER 4 TO PERMIT HIMTO TRY THE CASE; (3) THE COURT'S INABILITY PRIOR TO SEPTEMBER 4, DUE TO MR,MCGREGOR'S ABSENCE, TO DISCUSS WITH BOTH COUNSEL THE ANTICIPATED LENGTH OF THE TRIAL AND ANY NECESSARY PRETRIAL PROCEEDINGS, INCLUDING EVIDENTIARY HEARINGS UNDER EVIDENCE CODE SECTION 402 AND IN LIMINE MOTIONS; AND (4) THE COURT'S UNWILLINGNESS UNDER THE CIRCUMSTANCES TO REQUIRE A LARGE NUMBER OF PROSPECTIVE JURORS TO REPORT, QUITE POSSIBLY UNNECESSARILY, FOR JURYDUTY ON SEPTEMBER 4,/CONTD: JURY SELECTION/DOP/
docket_entries.description: /CAL:JURY TRIAL PROCEEDINGS/INTORD:KOREAN/X:THE PARTIES WERE SENT TO DEPT23 FOR SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS WITH JUDGE HITE, SETTLEMENT WAS NOT REACHED,THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED BACK AT 1:30 PM TO DEPARTMENT 10 FOR FURTHER PROCEEDINGS,/X: THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL BY ONE DAY, TO SEPTEMBER 5, 2018 FOR THE FOLLOWING REASONS, STATED IN MORE DETAIL ON THERECORD: (1) THE ABSENCE ON AUGUST 30 AND 31 OF ADA BLAIR MCGREGOR, THE ASSIGNED PROSECUTOR, DUE TO AN UNEXPECTED MEDICAL EMERGENCY MR, MCGREGOR SUFFERED THE EVENING OF AUGUST 29; (2) THE COURT'S UNCERTAINTY AS TO WHETHER MR,MCGREGOR'S HEALTH CONDITION WOULD IMPROVE SUFFICIENTLY BY SEPTEMBER 4 TO PERMIT HIMTO TRY THE CASE; (3) THE COURT'S INABILITY PRIOR TO SEPTEMBER 4, DUE TO MR,MCGREGOR'S ABSENCE, TO DISCUSS WITH BOTH COUNSEL THE ANTICIPATED LENGTH OF THE TRIAL AND ANY NECESSARY PRETRIAL PROCEEDINGS, INCLUDING EVIDENTIARY HEARINGS UNDER EVIDENCE CODE SECTION 402 AND IN LIMINE MOTIONS; AND (4) THE COURT'S UNWILLINGNESS UNDER THE CIRCUMSTANCES TO REQUIRE A LARGE NUMBER OF PROSPECTIVE JURORS TO REPORT, QUITE POSSIBLY UNNECESSARILY, FOR JURYDUTY ON SEPTEMBER 4,/CONTD: JURY SELECTION/DOP/
